recommendations.title: Add concurrency controls
recommendations.rationale: Overlapping release automation can duplicate work.
recommendations.proposed_change: Add workflow concurrency keyed by ref.

recommendations.title: Align timeout handling
recommendations.rationale: Consistent timeouts make failures easier to compare.
recommendations.proposed_change: Use explicit timeout-minutes across both workflows.
